title: HarnessDefinition
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a .harness/<slug>.md file. A Harness is a stateful conversational shell with modes, threads, tool-approval gates, subagents, and observational memory. Today the canonical runtime is Mastra's Harness class (@mastra/core/harness); the spec is implementation-agnostic.
$comment: Relationship to other AIPs: a Harness HAS agents (via modes[].agent and HarnessConfig.agent) but IS NOT a subtype of AIP-42. AIP-42 agents are referenced from harness manifests via $resolver. See also AIP-12 for agent pack ingestion — packs can auto-generate .harness/ manifests from modes/*.md files.

spec.description: Pins the spec version this manifest conforms to.

id.description: Unique harness identifier (kebab-case). Used as the $id in the resolver registry.

description.description: One-sentence description of this harness's purpose.

version.description: Manifest semver. Bump on breaking mode/subagent changes.

storage.description: Storage backend resolver. Must resolve to a MastraCompositeStore.

stateSchema.description: Optional JSON Schema defining the conversation state shape (validated by the Harness).

initialState.description: Default values for the state schema fields.

modes.description: Operational modes (e.g. plan/execute, brief/draft/review). At least one required.

memory.description: Optional memory resolver. Observational Memory is configured via omConfig on the Harness constructor, not here.

workspace.description: Optional workspace resolver (Mastra Workspace or WorkspaceConfig).

resolver.description: Resolver for (modelId: string) => LanguageModel. Used as Harness.resolveModel.

subagents.description: Child agents that can be spawned by the builtin subagent tool.

consumes.description: Extension slugs this harness consumes from the host (e.g. 'workspace:files').

exposes.description: Extension slugs this harness makes available to subagents.

heartbeats.description: Periodic background handlers (e.g. OM reflector, progress reporter).

oneOf.description: Reference to a named value in the resolver registry.
Dynamic resolver invocation with optional typed input.

id.description: Unique mode identifier within this harness (e.g. 'plan', 'execute', 'review').

default.description: If true, this mode is activated on new sessions.

color.description: UI hint — hex or CSS color name.

transitionsTo.description: Mode id to switch to after submit_plan approval completes.

defaultModelId.description: Bootstrap model id for this mode. Falls back to the harness-level resolveModel.

agent.description: Backing Mastra Agent. Prefer a single shared agent on HarnessConfig.agent with per-mode instructions layered on top.

model.description: Model resolution config for this mode. Resolver must produce a { modelId, defaultModelId?, allowed? } object.

tools.description: Tools for this mode. Mutually exclusive with additionalTools — setting this REPLACES agent tools.

blocks.description: Ordered instruction blocks. Resolved to strings and concatenated for the mode's instructions field.

permissions.description: Default permission rules for this mode (PermissionRules from @mastra/core/harness).

agent.description: Backing agent resolver. The bridge instantiateHarness() derives instructions from prompt.blocks.

forked.description: If true, inherits parent thread + prompt cache (cheaper). If false, gets a fresh isolated thread.

allowedHarnessTools.description: Subset of parent harness builtin tools available to this subagent.

allowedWorkspaceTools.description: Subset of workspace tools available to this subagent.

blocks.description: Instruction blocks. Flattened to a string and passed as HarnessSubagent.instructions (required by Mastra API).
